creator: doctorwhoguy@gmail.com
text:
Created attachment 248960
Example error message

Well, it may not necessarily be portmaster, after all. Either that, or portmaster somehow leaves behind traces that can be picked up by make somehow. For example, if I go to ../multimedia/emby-server and type "make", everything goes fine until it reaches shells/bash-completion. Then I get *multiple* copies of the error instead of just one as with portmaster.
